metadata.title: WXCode Design Plugins
metadata.description: First-party admin / dashboard / cockpit plugins curated by WXCode for Open Design daemons. Tenant VMs register this catalog as a marketplace source to consume plugins without rebuild.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-aegis-insurance
plugins.title: Aegis Insurance Admin
plugins.description: Institutional light-mode operations dashboard for an insurance carrier — policy & claims lifecycle management. Left sidebar with line-of-business switcher, topbar with period filter, 4 KPI cards, claims pipeline board, policies table, renewals panel, and inline SVG claims trend chart.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-ai-copilot
plugins.title: AI Copilot Admin
plugins.description: Admin dashboard with a permanent AI copilot rail. Deterministic widget canvas on the left, conversational agent on the right, Cmd+K command palette, inline suggestion chips, tool-call cards. The 2025 pattern for agentic admin UIs.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-aurora-analytics
plugins.title: Aurora Analytics Admin
plugins.description: Aurora Analytics Admin is a polished light-mode dashboard for product and growth teams who need at-a-glance visibility into sessions, conversion, and retention. It pairs a fixed left sidebar with a top search bar, four live KPI tiles, an area chart of weekly sessions, a recent-sessions table, and a right-rail insights panel — all rendered in a single self-contained HTML file. Designed for clarity over decoration: indigo-violet accents on a crisp slate-and-white canvas.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-bento-overview
plugins.title: Bento Ops Overview
plugins.description: Operations overview dashboard built on a bento-grid layout — asymmetric tiles of varied sizes spanning a neutral canvas. One hero metric, an inline SVG area chart, KPI pills, donut chart, activity feed, mini-table, and status tile. Multi-accent palette: indigo, teal, amber, rose.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-bloom-nonprofit
plugins.title: Bloom Nonprofit Admin
plugins.description: Warm-optimistic light-mode admin dashboard for nonprofit fundraising and donor management — org/program switcher sidebar, KPI cards, campaigns progress, donations trend chart, donor-segments donut, and recent donations table. Original archetype with emerald + coral accent palette.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-carbon-devops
plugins.title: Carbon DevOps Admin
plugins.description: Dark-mode CI/CD operations dashboard — terminal-inspired admin for pipeline runs, deploy frequency, build health, and incident tracking. Original archetype built for DevOps and platform engineering teams.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-cargo-fleet
plugins.title: Cargo Fleet Admin
plugins.description: Industrial-clean logistics admin for fleet & shipment operations — left hub/region sidebar, topbar with region filter, 4 KPI cards (in-transit / on-time rate / active fleet / warehouse utilization), a Kanban-style shipment status board, an original abstract route/region SVG visualization, and a live active-shipments table. Orange-amber accent on white/slate canvas.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-circle-social
plugins.title: Circle Community Admin
plugins.description: Friendly light-mode admin dashboard for online community and social platform operators — left sidebar with community switcher, topbar with search and date-range, 4 KPI cards, moderation queue with approve/remove actions, engagement chart, members table, and trending/flagged side panel. Original archetype for the community-ops use case.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-cobalt-projects
plugins.title: Cobalt Projects Admin
plugins.description: Focused project and work-management admin dashboard — light mode with cobalt-blue accent, left sidebar project list, topbar search and view switch, 4 KPI cards, a compact gantt-style timeline strip, a My Tasks table, and a Team/Milestones side panel.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-coral-billing
plugins.title: Coral Billing Admin
plugins.description: Clean-fintech billing operations dashboard — left sidebar, topbar with period picker, 4 KPI cards (MRR / active subscriptions / churn / ARPU), inline SVG trend chart, plan breakdown bars, invoices table, and a dunning side panel. Coral accent on white surfaces.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-dense-grid
plugins.title: Dense Grid Admin
plugins.description: High-density dark-mode operations dashboard in the trading-desk style — compact rows, monospace tabular figures, color-coded deltas, watchlist, positions table, order book, sparkline strip, and stats row. Maximum information per pixel with a 4-px spacing grid.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-ember-campaigns
plugins.title: Ember Campaigns Admin
plugins.description: Vibrant-but-clean marketing command centre — left sidebar, topbar with date-range filter, 4 KPI cards (reach / CTR / spend / ROAS) with inline SVG sparklines, a multi-series campaign performance chart, a conversion funnel, and a campaigns table with channel chips and status pills. Rose-pink accent on white/slate canvas.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-estate-realty
plugins.title: Estate Realty Admin
plugins.description: Real-estate brokerage back-office admin — light mode, teal accent, left sidebar with brokerage switcher, 4 KPI cards (active listings, deals in progress, avg days on market, commission MTD), listings table, deals pipeline, and agent leaderboard.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-finance-terminal
plugins.title: Finance Terminal Admin
plugins.description: Bloomberg-Terminal-style institutional admin: pure-black canvas, amber accents, dense monospace data tables, multi-panel grid for scanning 50+ data points without scrolling. Use for trading desks, treasury, risk, ops control rooms.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-forge-mes
plugins.title: Forge Admin
plugins.description: Dark industrial-grade admin aesthetic: near-black canvas (#0c0f14), raised steel panels, molten-orange accent (#f97316), Inter type with tabular figures, and dense hairline-bordered tables. Archetype = entity-switcher navbar + icon rail + 4 KPI tiles + 2-column status board with an alerts side panel + full-width records table with status pills, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for high-density operational consoles that read at a glance.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-frost-glass
plugins.title: Frost Glass Admin
plugins.description: Glassmorphism operations dashboard — frosted translucent cards layered over a deep indigo-violet-teal gradient canvas. Signature style: backdrop-filter blur, 1px translucent borders, soft ambient shadows, cyan and violet accents on near-black. Use when the brief calls for a dark, premium, or futuristic analytics look.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-glassmorphism
plugins.title: Glassmorphism Admin
plugins.description: Dark-mode admin built on frosted glass panels — translucent surfaces with backdrop blur over a soft colored aurora gradient, cyan accent, hairline white-alpha borders. Modern alternative to flat-card SaaS admins.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-harbor-banking
plugins.title: Harbor Banking Admin
plugins.description: Digital banking / personal finance operations console — light mode, navy-blue accent, teal secondary. Left account sidebar, topbar with search and notifications, hero payment-card SVG, 3 KPI tiles, spending donut chart, recent transactions table, and quick-transfer payees panel.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-jetstream-airline
plugins.title: Jetstream Airline Admin
plugins.description: Airline operations control center — dark-mode admin dashboard with slim navbar, icon rail, KPI tiles (on-time performance, flights today, load factor, delayed), live flights board, departures-by-hour SVG chart, flights table, and crew/aircraft side panel. Original archetype for aviation and transport operations.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-kinetic-fitness
plugins.title: Kinetic Fitness Admin
plugins.description: Dark-mode gym and fitness studio operations dashboard — active member KPIs, live class schedule with capacity bars, weekly attendance area chart, members table with plan/status, and coach panel. Original energetic dark-green palette with lime accent.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-meadow-agri
plugins.title: Meadow Agri Admin
plugins.description: Original agriculture farm-management admin dashboard — light mode, natural green and earth-amber palette, left sidebar with farm/region switcher, 4 KPI cards, fields status board, yield forecast chart, sensors table, and weather plus tasks side panel.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-meridian-people
plugins.title: Meridian People Admin
plugins.description: HR and people-operations admin dashboard — warm-professional light mode with indigo accent, left sidebar org/team switcher, 4 KPI tiles (headcount, attendance, open roles, turnover), headcount-over-time chart, department breakdown, employees table, and a time-off requests panel.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-midnight-ops
plugins.title: Midnight Ops Console
plugins.description: A production-grade dark-mode operations and observability dashboard built for on-call engineers and SRE teams. Features a compact left icon rail, four live metric tiles with inline trend sparklines, a time-series throughput chart, an active incidents table with severity pills, and a per-service health status list — all in a high-contrast teal-on-midnight palette optimised for 3 AM focus.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-neobrutal
plugins.title: Neobrutalist Admin
plugins.description: A neo-brutalist admin dashboard — thick black borders, hard 4px offset shadows, vibrant pastel blocks (coral / lime / cream), monospaced numerics. Use when the brief asks for an admin with personality: 'brutalist admin', 'pastel dashboard', 'bold borders', 'flat blocks'.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-onyx-crypto
plugins.title: Onyx Crypto Admin
plugins.description: Dark-mode digital-asset portfolio console — left rail nav, topbar with network/wallet switcher, 4 KPI cards, area price chart, holdings table, and market movers side list. Sleek neon aesthetic with emerald and violet accents.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-pixel-liveops
plugins.title: Pixel LiveOps Admin
plugins.description: Dark-mode game studio live-operations dashboard — neon purple/cyan accent on deep-space backgrounds. Sidebar game switcher, topbar period filter, 4 KPI tiles (DAU / D1 retention / ARPDAU / live events), DAU chart, live events board, top in-game items table, player segments panel. Original archetype for game ops teams.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-pulse-crm
plugins.title: Pulse CRM Admin
plugins.description: Airy light-mode sales CRM admin — left sidebar with workspace switcher, topbar with search and filters, 4 pipeline KPI tiles with sparklines, horizontal pipeline-by-stage strip, recent deals table with stage pills, and a right-side activity and tasks panel. Sky-blue accent on a white/slate canvas.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-quartz-lms
plugins.title: Quartz LMS Admin
plugins.description: Friendly-academic LMS administration dashboard — purple accent, left sidebar with school/program switcher, topbar with term selector, 4 KPI tiles (active students, courses, completion rate, avg score), enrollment/completion chart, courses table with progress bars, and upcoming assignments panel.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-relay-helpdesk
plugins.title: Relay Helpdesk Admin
plugins.description: Friendly light-mode helpdesk operations dashboard — left inbox sidebar, topbar with search and assignee filter, 4 KPI cards (open tickets, avg first response, SLA compliance, CSAT), SLA-by-priority bar set, ticket queue table, and team load panel. Accent violet with green/amber/red status semantics.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-saas-bestseller
plugins.title: SaaS Admin Bestseller
plugins.description: The market-leading SaaS admin archetype — polished light-mode dashboard with collapsible sidebar, breadcrumb topbar, 4 stat tiles, primary chart, recent table, side activity. Modeled after the Metronic / Vuexy / Velzon family that dominates Themeforest's admin category.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-savory-pos
plugins.title: Savory POS Admin
plugins.description: Restaurant point-of-sale back-office admin: warm light mode, amber + tomato accent, left sidebar with venue switcher, live orders kanban (New / Cooking / Served), KPI tiles, top-selling items, sales sparkline, and recent orders table.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-slate-commerce
plugins.title: Slate Commerce Admin
plugins.description: A clean, light-mode e-commerce back-office dashboard with warm neutral surfaces, emerald accents, and amber highlights. Ships with a sidebar store switcher, topbar date range selector, four KPI cards with inline sparklines, a revenue bar chart, a recent orders table with status badges, and a top products list — everything a merchant needs at a glance.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-sprout-iot
plugins.title: Sprout IoT Admin
plugins.description: Dark-mode IoT device-fleet and telemetry console — left rail nav, gateway/site switcher, 4 KPI cards (online/offline/signal/alerts), multi-series sparkline telemetry panel, active alerts list, and a devices table with signal bars and firmware status.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-statute-legal
plugins.title: Statute Legal Admin
plugins.description: Refined light-mode law firm dashboard for case and matter management — practice-area sidebar, KPI tiles for active cases / billable hours / deadlines / realization rate, matters table with status pills, upcoming deadlines panel, matters-by-practice chart, and recent documents list. Burgundy-gold accent palette on warm white surfaces.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-sterling-bankops
plugins.title: Sterling Bank Ops Admin
plugins.description: Retail banking back-office operations dashboard — sober slate-blue and emerald palette, left sidebar with branch switcher, topbar with period picker, 4 KPI cards, an approvals queue, a transactions table, a risk/exceptions panel, and an inline SVG throughput chart. Designed for trust and clarity.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-talent-ats
plugins.title: Talent ATS Admin
plugins.description: Recruiting & applicant-tracking dashboard archetype — left sidebar with requisition switcher, topbar with period picker and avatar, 4 KPI cards (open roles / candidates / interviews / time-to-hire), kanban-style hiring pipeline, recruiting funnel SVG, candidates table, and upcoming-interviews side panel. Indigo + pink accent, light HR aesthetic.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-vault-treasury
plugins.title: Vault Treasury Admin
plugins.description: Premium dark-mode corporate treasury dashboard — amber/gold accent on deep navy, left rail nav, entity/period switcher, 4 KPI cards (balance · inflows · outflows · runway), cashflow SVG area chart, allocation donut, recent transactions table with status pills.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-verdant-clinic
plugins.title: Verdant Clinic Admin
plugins.description: Calm, clinical light-mode admin dashboard for clinic and healthcare operations — left sidebar with department switcher, topbar with search and clinician avatar, 4 KPI cards (patients today, appointments, avg wait, bed occupancy), today's appointment schedule, vitals occupancy mini-chart, and a recent patients table. Emerald-to-teal accent palette with triage status colors.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-volt-energy
plugins.title: Volt Energy Admin
plugins.description: Dark-mode utility grid operations control-room dashboard — KPI tiles, regions/sites status board, dual-series load/generation chart, alerts table, and sites side panel. Amber + cyan accent on deep navy. Original archetype for energy and infrastructure operations.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-voyage-travel
plugins.title: Voyage Travel Admin
plugins.description: Airy light-mode operations dashboard for travel agencies — region/agency switcher sidebar, topbar with date-range picker, 4 KPI cards, itinerary board, destinations breakdown, recent bookings table, and occupancy side panel. Sky-and-coral accent palette; original copy and invented data.
